curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge commit (28cff3a) merging PR #326 into gofiber/template. The first parent (fd5a1ab) is the pre-patch commit. The fix changes pongo2.SetAutoescape(false) to pongo2.SetAutoescape(e.autoEscape) in the Load() function and sets autoEscape to true by default in all engine constructors. Only one non-test source file was modified (django/django.go). Other template engines in the repo (ace, amber, handlebars, html, jet, mustache, pug, slim) use different template libraries and do not share this pongo2-specific autoescape pattern. The pre-assigned vulnerability class 'xss' is correct per CWE-79 and the advisory description.
